summary: Excellent audience tape of an intense 1988 show featuring a soaring Stella Blue, epic The Other One and a standout Dear Mr. Fantasy.
review: The recording is a well‑balanced audience capture that lets the raw energy of the night shine through.  Fans praise Jerry’s impassioned performance despite vocal strain, highlighting a transcendent Stella Blue, an adventurous Other One and an inspired Dear Mr. Fantasy.  Overall the show feels intense and memorable.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviewers are highly positive; the show is described as intense with several standout moments, and the audience tape is called excellent and well‑balanced.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Well‑balanced audience mix with clear instrument separation; no reported dropouts or muffiness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: High‑energy flow with powerful peaks on The Other One and Stella Blue, culminating in an inspired Dear Mr. Fantasy; the intensity never wanes.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Voice was strained but he gave his all and delivered a passionate performance.
